title: Bolt
author: StackBlitz
copyText:
## Editorial notes

Bolt is relevant for users who want prompt-to-running-app workflows in a browser environment with deployment-oriented iteration.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
detailMarkdown:
# Bolt

Browser-based AI app builder for creating, editing, running, and deploying web projects from prompts.

## Trust
- Source: source-backed
- Package: no package download
- Review: unclaimed
